title: epilobium nummulariifolium var. caespitosum
intro: Epilobium nummulariifolium var. caespitosum, also known as the woolly-fruited willowherb, is a perennial plant species belonging to the willowherb family (Onagraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antioxidant properties. Epilobium nummulariifolium var. caespitosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
